trans-unit.source: Please select a page from the page tree to run the accessibility check.
Run Accessibility Scan
Scanning engine:
axe-core (recommended)
HTML CodeSniffer
Loading page and running scan…
Violations
Needs review
Passes
No accessibility issues found.
Editor can fix
Developer must fix
Needs investigation
Filters
Severity:
Critical
Serious
Moderate
Minor
Show developer tasks
The accessibility scan could not be completed. Please try again.
No preview URL available for this page. Ensure the page has a valid site configuration.
Add an image description (alt text) in the content element editor.
This image is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's image rendering (developer task).
Add an alt text to the image input element in the content editor.
This image input is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's rendering (developer task).
Add alt text to the image map area in the content editor.
This image map area is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's rendering (developer task).
Edit the content element and change its Header Layout so heading levels don't skip a step.
This heading is rendered by the page template rather than a content element. Adjust the heading structure in the Fluid template (developer task).
A heading element is rendered with no text. Check the template's heading rendering; it should not output a heading tag when the source text is empty (developer task).
Edit the link in the content editor and provide a descriptive link text.
This link is rendered by the page template without link text and isn't linked to editable content. Add visible text or an aria-label in the Fluid template (developer task).
Update the table structure in the content editor to associate data cells with headers.
This table is not linked to editable content. Update the table structure in the template so data cells reference their headers (developer task).
Update the table in the content editor so header cells have associated data cells.
This table is not linked to editable content. Update the table structure in the template so header cells have associated data cells (developer task).
Add a main landmark element to the page template (developer task).
Ensure all page content is contained within appropriate landmark regions in the template (developer task).
Add a skip navigation link to the page template (developer task).
Set the lang attribute on the HTML element in the page template (developer task).
Use a valid BCP 47 language tag on the HTML element (developer task).
Adjust CSS color values to meet WCAG contrast requirements (developer task).
Remove user-scalable=no from the viewport meta tag in the template (developer task).
Add a title attribute to all iframe elements in the template (developer task).
Make scrollable regions keyboard-accessible in the template (developer task).
Check Accessibility
Check accessibility for this page
